description: It does what it says on the tin well and is not full of bloat. Simple, cost effective and good support.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy of use, reactive human support when you need it.
cons: Its missing a multi room system as you would need for hotels. So with channels like booking.com if a property is busy but you have another nearby (or on the same site) it wont show up as an alternative. Also a simple CRM (customer db) would be useful. Using our own domain name for system emails (but without buying the website package) would be nice also.

description: It’s been great. From initial discussion to ongoing advice and support. Highly recommend using Bookster.
author: Shona M.
pros: Individual support through installation, great follow-up support, seamless booking for our guests. The weekly opportunity to chat to Bookster is great. Amazing marketing support from the weekly sessions plus follow-up from those.
cons: Nothing. Whenever Dornie Croft has needed advice, Bookster has quickly responded and answered any questions.

review_title: Struggling with linking calendars but great customer service
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Really like the purpose of the software. Keen to take bookings ourselves and Bookster seems to tick all the boxes.
cons: Linking calendars is causing us grief. I am sure once this is sorted all will work perfectly. And the customer service is great.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I can not fault their service and the quality of the booking system that works perfectly with my website.
author: AMANDA C.
pros: Fantastic Customer Support. And ease of the booking system. There is always a knowledgeable person available at the end of the phone and they work hard to meet your requests.
cons: A couple of features missing eg Security Deposits- money is taken through stripe as opposed to stripe just holidng the card details; therefore you will always be charged a fee, even if you return the security deposit to guests. I know it is possible to have this options as I had it on my old booking system.

description: Our experience has been a welcome breath of fresh air in comparison with other software suppliers. And we've enlisted the work of quite a few. The team has an honest, open approach and is particularly adept at understanding and addressing operator needs. Of particular valuable now, in an industry struggling to cope with the destruction caused by the Covid pandemic. Customer communication and support has been available every step of the journey. The service and software performance top rated.
author: Julia C.
pros: In a nutshell, it does everything it claims on the tin! Simply executed in a way that can be easily understood and managed without having a technical degree. It handles the booking basics well and has developed 'add ons', totally in tune with the need of operators in the holiday rental sector. The focus is on functionality that can be easily implemented, rather than developing ' nice to have gadgets" that are too complex and peripheral to the core task. The software has grown functionality in tune with sector evolvement and customer needs. A keen focus on value for money. I particularly appreciate the limited use of complex jargon that some use to enshrine their software as a "dark art" to justify costs. It's not. The team's open problem-solving capability and approach is very 'can do'.
cons: At the start, I had to use 2 different applications of the software to add rates for some of our rental properties. This was due to the challenging seasonal rates system set by one large villa owner. Now, however, all functionality is aligned on one platform that has many relevant additions for the many demands of different operators in various hospitality sectors. The training offered was limited to begin but this has been addressed. Bookster has an excellent chat system that is on hand and of real assistance right at the time you need it. This has helped us understand how we can overcome various challenges relevant to us and use the software to our optimum advantage.

description: I am very fortunate to have found Bookster as my chosen booking system software. They consistently deliver an excellent service . I would highly recommend Bookster to any potential business looking to use their software. They also designed my website to a very high standard. The team involved in Bookster are exceptionally helpful, friendly and always there to assist your needs in anyway they can.
author: Linda S.
pros: Easy to use and navigate around. Great features included for my business needs. Excellent user friendly booking system.
cons: If ever I feel any features are missing or need to be added Bookster immediately responds to my requests and feedback.

description: Our experience with Bookster has been overwhelmingly positive. It’s helped us streamline operations, reduce admin time, and increase bookings. It’s clear they understand the needs of holiday rental businesses, and their continuous improvements to the platform make it feel like a long-term partner rather than just a software tool. Highly recommend!
author: Daisy C.
pros: The platform is incredibly user-friendly. The integration with our website and various booking channels has been seamless, saving us loads of time. The support team is also fantastic - responsive, helpful, and genuinely interested in our success. There are automation tools for guest communication and the customisable booking settings.
cons: No real cons, as all issues are very quickly resolved. The team are really responsive and help guide us through everything.

description: Very good. I would recommend Bookster because of the syncing of calendars and kind help at hand. I wouldn’t have got this far without them
author: Sarah C.
pros: I like the personal response & the experts who understand your problem then their help to find a solution.
cons: The Bookster system is inflexible. I’d like to edit the form used to collect Party Details but there’s no option to do this. I sync with VRBO.

description: Fantastic . They are always there to support us in person. Services are tailored to our need which is what we like and we can't rate highly enough
author: Anna M.
pros: Easy to get hold of and very friendly and helpful team. Robust and functional software. Our guests love it
cons: Smaller company which is some ways had little drawbacks but this most definitely is outweighed by the positives and we will not move to a bigger company.

description: A great team with a really good product. An easy to use channel manager, as well as nicely designed websites that are functional and look great too!
author: Joni S.
pros: The whole Bookster Team are very helpful and friendly! Whenever we've needed help or advice they are quick to reply and eager to help us out.
cons: Nothing really...we have worked with Bookster for 6 years and it's only positive. It would be hard to find a negative - apart from making it easier for guests to leave reviews on our website!!

review_title: Excellent channel manager for handling apartment bookings. Fantastic support provided by Robin.
author: Isty A.
pros: I have never used a channel manager before, but Robin gave me a demo and showed me what Bookster could do to make running our apartment easier, and I am delighted to say that once set up the software handles the pricing and availability pushing out to various channels. I'm still in the process of setting up with the various channels but this take the pressure away from having double bookings !
cons: I think a little more flexibility would be great but for 99% of users the interface and options provided are as required.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Iain M.
pros: Easy to use for owner and guests Excellent customer service Even the basic website design service produces something with a quality look.
cons: At the moment, nothing comes to mind. Been using it a year and so far so good.

review_title: A very good software to manage one rental property
description: Overall, it has helped me manage my one rental properly satisfactorily.
author: Neha V.
pros: Very good support which can be customized as per the requirement. Ease of use The ability to set reminders for clients whose payments are due Integration with booking.com
cons: I would love it if the software could link to more websites in the rental domain. Also, the layout of the dashboard could be slightly more user friendly

review_title: I can't use this software I paid the money to join and find it of absolutely no use to me I feel as
description: none
author: ronnie C.
pros: nothing I can't use the software I've spent hours trying to set it up and it still shows me not having any rooms to let
cons: The fact that it's impossible for me to use it see above I can't publish anything on it it is simply no good to me
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Easy to use and clear thanks of the calendar system. You can check your bookings anytime and everywhere, that's really convenient. Good if you don't already have your own website as a renter. Also good too increase your bookings.. I recommend Bookster to all the renters who wish to have or keep their own website !
author: Justine W.

description: Very good indeed. We were effectively led through what was a daunting process and it is reassuring to know help and advice is always on hand.
author: Mark M.
pros: The support we have received has been excellent. Questions and queries are replied to promptly and efficiently.
cons: Inability to reply to messages from third party platforms from within Bookster in the basic package.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Nice company to deal with and easy to work with
author: Nick L.
pros: Bookster offered a good easy to use product with sifferent levels of functionality depending on size. Our bookster site was a real strength.
cons: We felt the booking calendar and pricing set up could have done with improvements.

description: Fairly happy, they generally resolve issues quickly.
author: Gordon P.
pros: Easy to use as the owner administrator, I can update it as often as I want. I am able to use offers discouts which are great for my regular guests.
cons: On the entry page, It does not allow for a simple say 2 line description of the business, thus I put that in the communication tab but not sure guests read that.Calandar view dows not show notes so I still use my Airbnb channel calandar to put quick view notes for each booking eg how many people, beds needed, early or late arrival etc.

description: Very friendly and responsive team who take a pro active approach to local issues too.
author: Erin M.
pros: It has an easy interface and is easy to use on a daily basis. It is also a local company we were happy to support.
cons: It took time to figure out the different pieces. I couldn't easily see the pricing rules which resulted in mistakes.

review_title: More than a Holiday Rental Software
description: Bookster is helping our small business stand out in an increasingly competitive market. The constant improvements, great analytics and the dedicated customer support are making our life easier, speeding up our work process and helping us better understand the market. As result, we are increasing our booking lead-time, average price per booking and our hosts are really happy!
author: Davide T.
pros: + Great customer support, very responsive and friendly + Extensive booking analytics (Including Google Analytics) + Integrates with review websites + Constant improvements to the software + Integrates with other booking agents + Great tool for bulk addition of promo codes, discounts, extras and more. + Suitable for different kind of accommodation + Email marketing (for newsletters, automation etc.) + You can create Blogs and Landing Pages + Bespoke services (website creator, branding, SEO and more)
cons: - Some customer-focused elements are not visually appealing (Booking Add-ons and Guest Area) - Needs some improvements to the Customer Relationship Management software

review_title: The best Rental booking software I have ever used
description: Bookster have a very professional team, they make you feel part of a family. We joined over 2 years ago and it has never broken down or not done what it is supposed to. The start up process was made very easy - also the estimate to set it up and create our website was very accurate. They are very proactive and give excellent support and online seminars to keep everybody up to date the the vacation rental business. The day to day use has really changed my life - we are quite a small company but have managed to grow as the time we save using Bookster means we can take on more properties.
author: Sandy G.
pros: Ease of use - offering a professional platform for both guests and users. For example the ability do almost all tasks on a mobile while out and about - therefore it enables you to maximise the bookings of offer.
cons: I'm struggling to answer this question - I love it all,

description: Excellent
author: Craig D.
pros: It s interface is very user friendly and that decreases the stress of operating my business
cons: Nothing -In the past i have suggested devs and they have been done

description: I am enjoying using the Bookster system to upload blogs on our website, which is much easier than other tools
author: Dani L.
pros: A good support team who work hard to work the product to suit our company's needs. Very easy to use for both our agency and our customers.
cons: Due to the complexity of our businesses, which combines 3 brands, there can sometimes be teething issues

description: Bookster has been a great platform and the team has always been quick to respond to queries and issues.
author: Gavin B.
pros: The ease of setting up pricing options through the year
cons: Dealing with virtual cards on booking.com, it says the customer has paid but the card has not yet been charged

description: We are holiday letting company based in East Lothian and have found that using this software has completely changed the running of our business, making holiday bookings simple, no more double bookings. The support team are just amazing and react very quickly
author: Gillian C.
pros: Gosh so many things. I think the automated email reminders sent to clients letting them know that their balance payment is due. This tracking system saves us so much time, the system is set to take online payments and alerts us is payments have not been made in time. The live calendars enable holiday guests to book 24 hours a day and so our bookings have increased since taking on this system
cons: The only slight problem is that the software does not link both ways with Holiday Lettings and Trip Advisor.
